MOTION Notice To Appoint Kazuko Moody As Successor-In-Interest To And Substitute In Interest For , Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-20-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL 898-1555, for plaintiffs ROBERT MOODY and KAZOKO MOODY, moving To Appoint Kazuko Moody As Successor-In-Interest To And Substitute In Interest For, Robert Moody, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFFS ROBERT MOODY and KAZOKO MOODY'S MOTION To Appoint Kazuko Moody As Successor-In-Interest To And Substitute In Interest For, Robert Moody, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint -- Granted -- no opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (PHA/301/JU) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
